data.name: CategoryId
data.value: Unique identifier of the associated category.
data.comment: References the related category.

data.name: CreatedAt
data.value: Date and time when the entity was created.
data.comment: Automatically assigned upon creation.

data.name: CustomerId
data.value: Unique identifier of the associated customer.
data.comment: References the customer related to the entity.

data.name: DeletedAt
data.value: Date and time when the entity was deleted.
data.comment: Used for soft deletion.

data.name: Description
data.value: Description providing additional information.
data.comment: Detailed textual information about the entity.

data.name: Id
data.value: Unique identifier of the entity.
data.comment: Primary key.

data.name: InventoryId
data.value: Unique identifier of the associated inventory record.
data.comment: References the related inventory.

data.name: IsDeleted
data.value: Indicates whether the entity has been soft deleted.
data.comment: Used by soft delete functionality.

data.name: Name
data.value: Name of the entity.
data.comment: Human-readable name.

data.name: OrderId
data.value: Unique identifier of the associated order.
data.comment: References the related order.

data.name: PaymentId
data.value: Unique identifier of the associated payment.
data.comment: References the related payment.

data.name: Price
data.value: Monetary value of the entity.
data.comment: Represents the unit price.

data.name: ProductId
data.value: Unique identifier of the associated product.
data.comment: References the related product.

data.name: Quantity
data.value: Quantity associated with the entity.
data.comment: Represents the number of units.

data.name: Status
data.value: Current status of the entity.
data.comment: Represents the lifecycle state.

data.name: TotalPrice
data.value: Total calculated monetary value.
data.comment: Represents the aggregate amount.

data.name: UpdatedAt
data.value: Date and time of the last update.
data.comment: Updated whenever the entity changes.

data.name: IsActive
data.value: Indicates whether the entity is active.
data.comment: Determines if the entity is currently active and available for use.

data.name: ParentCategoryId
data.value: Unique identifier of the parent category.
data.comment: References the parent category in a hierarchical structure.

data.name: Amount
data.value: Monetary amount.
data.comment: Represents the numeric value of a monetary amount.

data.name: CartId
data.value: Unique identifier of the associated cart.
data.comment: References the related shopping cart.

data.name: City
data.value: City name.
data.comment: Represents the city portion of an address.

data.name: ContentType
data.value: Content type of the file.
data.comment: Represents the MIME type of the stored file.

data.name: Country
data.value: Country name.
data.comment: Represents the country portion of an address.

data.name: Currency
data.value: Currency code.
data.comment: Represents the ISO currency code associated with the monetary value.

data.name: FileName
data.value: Name of the file.
data.comment: Stores the original or assigned file name.

data.name: FilePath
data.value: Path where the file is stored.
data.comment: Specifies the storage location of the file.

data.name: FileSize
data.value: Size of the file in bytes.
data.comment: Represents the total size of the stored file.

data.name: IsAvailable
data.value: Indicates whether the entity is available.
data.comment: Determines if the entity is currently available for use or purchase.

data.name: IsMain
data.value: Indicates whether this item is the primary one.
data.comment: Specifies if the record is marked as the primary item.

data.name: OrderNumber
data.value: Unique business identifier of the order.
data.comment: Represents the human-readable order number.

data.name: PaidAt
data.value: Date and time the payment was completed.
data.comment: Records when the payment was successfully processed.

data.name: PostalCode
data.value: Postal or ZIP code.
data.comment: Represents the postal code of an address.

data.name: ProductName
data.value: Name of the associated product.
data.comment: Represents the display name of the product.

data.name: State
data.value: State or province.
data.comment: Represents the state or province portion of an address.

data.name: Street
data.value: Street address.
data.comment: Represents the street portion of an address.

data.name: TransactionId
data.value: Unique identifier of the payment transaction.
data.comment: References the external or internal payment transaction.

data.name: UnitPrice
data.value: Price of a single unit.
data.comment: Represents the price per individual unit.

data.name: UserId
data.value: Unique identifier of the associated user.
data.comment: References the user related to the entity.
